---
title: "compose_displacement"
generated: true
description: "Displacement of the composed deformation $( mathrm{id} +  mathrm{outer})  circ ( mathrm{id} +  mathrm{inner})$."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.deformation`](../nitrix-geometry-deformation.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:compose_displacement -->
```python
compose_displacement(outer: Float[Array, '*spatial ndim'], inner: Float[Array, '*spatial ndim'], *, mode: BoundaryMode = 'nearest') -> Float[Array, '*spatial ndim']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:compose_displacement -->
Displacement of the composed deformation
$(\mathrm{id} + \mathrm{outer}) \circ (\mathrm{id} + \mathrm{inner})$.

The composed deformation maps
$x \mapsto x + \mathrm{inner}(x) + \mathrm{outer}(x + \mathrm{inner}(x))$,
so the displacement is
$\mathrm{inner} + \mathrm{outer} \circ (\mathrm{id} + \mathrm{inner})$.
Warping an image by the result equals warping by `inner` then by
`outer`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:compose_displacement -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `outer` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | Displacement fields, `(*spatial, ndim)` (the trailing axis is the displacement vector). |
| `inner` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | Displacement fields, `(*spatial, ndim)` (the trailing axis is the displacement vector). |
| `mode` | `BoundaryMode` | — | `'nearest'` | Boundary mode for sampling `outer` at the deformed positions (default `"nearest"` -- edge-replicate, the flow-field convention). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial` × `ndim`. The displacement field of the composed deformation, `(*spatial, ndim)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:compose_displacement -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
